title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But aren't they a little... different?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It must be your imagination... Lee Lee.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It stands out and it's safe, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no one had any clues,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and the name "Hogback" became a legend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't scare me like that!!! What's Wrong!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Then check it out for yourself.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
